findings.issue: Landing page conversion is not optimized, sample AURA profile is not visible without login
findings.recommended_fix: Implement a guest mode or a sample profile preview on the landing page to improve conversion rates

findings.issue: Share mechanics to LinkedIn/Instagram are not implemented
findings.recommended_fix: Develop and integrate share buttons for LinkedIn and Instagram to facilitate user sharing

findings.issue: Referral system is not clearly documented
findings.recommended_fix: Update documentation to reflect the referral system's functionality and benefits

findings.issue: SEO meta tags are not set, sitemap.xml is not live
findings.recommended_fix: Configure SEO meta tags and deploy sitemap.xml to improve search engine visibility

findings.issue: AZ-specific channels (Telegram groups, Instagram reels, YouTube shorts) are not utilized
findings.recommended_fix: Explore and leverage AZ-specific channels for marketing and user acquisition

findings.issue: First 100 users plan is not defined
findings.recommended_fix: Develop a plan to acquire the first 100 users, including targeted marketing and outreach strategies
